title: Codex Discoveries
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM CodexEntry WHERE IsNewEntry = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Category AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CodexEntry WHERE IsNewEntry = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Category ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} new codex entr(y/ies) recorded during the report period.
details.help: IsNewEntry = 1 filters to entries that were genuinely new discoveries for this commander. Category is the high-level codex grouping (e.g. Biology, Stellar, Thargoid, Guardian).

tagLines: New codex entries submitted to the Pilots Federation knowledge database. Catalogue updated.
First time anyone — or at least the first time you — officially noticed that.
Every entry is a page added to humanity's catalogue of the unknown.
